title: Bar, Bar — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

Bar is a city in Bar with a population of 42,000. A coastal town in southern Montenegro on the Adriatic Sea, known for its port, the Old Town of Stari Bar, and the long sandy beach of Šušanj.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
